message:
Split expressions.zig, fix list printing, add tuple support

Agent 1 - Split expressions.zig (522 → 152 lines):
- Created expressions/ subdirectory with 4 modules
- constants.zig (37), operators.zig (148), subscript.zig (206), collections.zig (75)
- All files now under 500 line limit

Agent 2 - Fix list print formatting:
- Lists now print as [1, 2, 3] not { 1, 2, 3 }
- Added custom formatting loop in genPrint for list types
- Fixed 9 tests that were failing on output format mismatch

Agent 3 - Implement basic tuple support:
- Tuple literals: t = (1, 2, 3)
- Tuple indexing: t[0], t[1]
- Tuple length: len(t)
- Type inference for tuples and tuple subscripts
- Generates Zig anonymous structs

Test results: 30 → 38 passing (+8 tests, 43% pass rate)
